name: Licorice Root Extract
description: A potent botanical brightener that inhibits melanin production and soothes inflamed skin.
scientificSummary: Glabridin, the key flavonoid in licorice root, inhibits UVB-induced melanogenesis more effectively than kojic acid.
mechanismOfAction: Glabridin inhibits tyrosinase activity and COX-2 expression, simultaneously reducing pigment and inflammation.

seo.title: Licorice Root Extract - Natural Brightener | Dew Theory
seo.description: Explore how Licorice Root Extract fades dark spots and calms inflammation naturally.
